name: Jinx - Imprisoned
description:
"There's no good version of me..."

Yeah, I'm not over Arcane... I'll never be over Arcane...

Just a little bot for the end of Arcane on that time when Jinx is in jail. I'll see if I make more. User isn't established so you can be anyone you want.
